title: PK/PD Statistical Programmer
description: Seeking experienced PK/PD Statistical Programmer with strong R programming, PK/PD datasets, and NONMEM dataset creation. Supports Pharmacometrics by producing high-quality, compliant datasets for modeling and analysis. Requires 6+ years industry experience, expert R, NONMEM, SDTM/ADaM standards.
match_reasons: Expert R programming and package development|Biotech background and clinical trial exposure via Synapse Clinical Winter School|Attention to detail and cross-functional collaboration experience
gaps: No NONMEM experience|No SDTM/ADaM knowledge|6 year minimum vs fresh graduate|No clinical data programming experience
